title: Hosted and Self-Hosted Runners, Isolation, Capacity, and Compatibility · Spiral Delivery Review
summary: An operations handoff reconstructs hosted and self-hosted runners, isolation, capacity, and compatibility from delayed run evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the runner isolation and capacity policy under changed load. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for runner isolation and capacity policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin or record runner OS, architecture, installed software, action runtime, image release, and migration assumptions instead of trusting latest as immutable.
Threat-model persistence, workspace residue, credentials, network reachability, daemon sockets, labels, groups, and repository eligibility for self-hosted runners.
Design single-job ephemeral runner registration, identity, network segmentation, secret delivery, teardown, log retention, and orphan cleanup.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Ci Hosted Runner Image Contract · changed case · Review Ci Hosted Runner Image Contract
steps.instruction:
review case — A review public pull request reaches a persistent self-hosted runner with Docker authority and cloud credentials while 40 jobs queue. Bound eligibility, ephemerality, compatibility, capacity, evidence, and destruction. Competency probe: Pin or record runner OS, architecture, installed software, action runtime, image release, and migration assumptions instead of trusting latest as immutable.

Which action demonstrates Ci Hosted Runner Image Contract without dropping earlier contracts?

For Ci Hosted Runner Image Contract · changed case · Review Ci Hosted Runner Image Contract, keep Ci Hosted Runner Image Contract connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.
